query:
UPDATE partners 
SET expenseCoverage = JSON_OBJECT(
  'rentFee', true,
  'propertyFee', true,
  'utilityFee', true,
  'consumablesFee', false,
  'cleaningFee', false,
  'phoneFee', false,
  'deferredPayment', false,
  'expressFee', false,
  'promotionFee', false,
  'teacherFee', true,
  'transportFee', true,
  'otherFee', false
)
WHERE id IS NOT NULL;
command:

  'rentFee', true,
  'propertyFee', true,
  'utilityFee', true,
  'consumablesFee', false,
  'cleaningFee', false,
  'phoneFee', false,
  'deferredPayment', false,
  'expressFee', false,
  'promotionFee', false,
  'teacherFee', true,
  'transportFee', true,
  'otherFee', false
)
